adapted_package_paths.README.md: Factorio 2.0 release positioning for the 2.4.9 stability patch
adapted_package_paths.changelog.txt: MIR 2.4.9 player-visible stability and safety history
adapted_package_paths.info.json: MIR 2.4.9 version and Factorio 2.0 dependency contract
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/emit/effect_safety.lua: generic target sanitation for generated and external technology effects
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/platform/factorio/prototy: entity target resolver required by turret-attack
adapted_package_paths.prototypes/mir/runtime/productivity_fami: remove the unproven global technology-effect reset

deferred_features.technology-design-lifecycle: planned for MIR 2.5; excluded from the 2.4.9 stability patch
deferred_features.automatic-family-expansion: remains disabled and is not broadened by this patch
